movie_results.title: Star Wars: Episode II - Attack of the Clones
movie_results.original_title: Star Wars: Episode II - Attack of the Clones
movie_results.overview: Following an assassination attempt on Senator Padmé Amidala, Jedi Knights Anakin Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi investigate a mysterious plot into the heart of the Separatist movement and the beginning of the Clone Wars.
